title: Amtech - Sealant Remover and Smoothing Tools for Removing and Applying Sealant, Scratch-Resistant for Neat and Damage-Free Finish, Versatile Home DIY
features: IDEAL PRODUCT: This sealant remover and smoothing kit ensures effortless application, smoothing, and removal of sealant
VERSATILE SMOOTHING: The kit includes two tools for different thicknesses and angles, providing a precise finish for any task
SIMPLIFIED REMOVAL: The integrated cutting knife makes the removal of sealant as simple as possible
EASY APPLICATION: Eliminate too much wastage by simply cutting the silicone nozzle to the same diameter as the profiling tool, making the bead more compatible.
ALL-IN-ONE: Everything you need for neat and tidy sealant application is included, all in one handy kit
description: Product Description Effortlessly remove and achieve a professional finish with our sealant remover and smoothing kit. Designed for the easy removal of old sealant and the precise application of new sealant, this kit includes two smoothing tools for all thicknesses and angles. The integrated cutting knife allows you to neatly remove sealant, ensuring extra convenience. With multiple bead profiles and a nozzle cutter blade, you can achieve a smooth, flawless finish every time. Upgrade your DIY projects with this all-in-one kit that ensures seamless sealant application, and minimises mess. Safety Warning No
